{"query":"UPDATE produktionsAnlagenConfig SET intTp_ID = '2', \r\n unt_ID = '2',mst_ID = '',startDate = '2021',endDate = '2021',startWeek = '3',endWeek = '4',ending = '0',note = '\nupdate 01-03 end no ending\n',einheitControlSys = '4',iBdeType = '1',mstIMw = 'prdkt_1' WHERE prd_id = '1017' AND anl_id = '80' AND anl_col = 'anl01_ID' "}
